creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
It seems that requirements of sysutils/fusefs-ext2 are not met by the nobootfsck flavour of sysutils/e2fsprogs. 

From <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/sysutils/e2fsprogs/Makefile?id=54b26298c82275501e6dcc6c733d21c0a6bf0d9f>: 

> - nobootfsck: do not install into /sbin, but this makes fsck
>   unavailable for ext2/ext3/ext4 file systems before $PREFIX/ is
>   mounted

– I'm not certain, but I doubt that this is enough to make the flavour truly non-satisfactory. 

----
